en_title: Former Assassin's Creed, Watch Dogs Director Likens Large-Scale Game Development to Working With 'Flaming Barrels Falling Down From a Construction Site,' Months After Parting Ways With Ubisoft
cn_title: 前育碧《刺客信条》《看门狗》总监：大型游戏开发如同躲避燃烧木桶
subtitle: 千人团队的失控感

paragraphs.en: Watch Dogs and Splinter Cell development veteran Clint Hocking has described the experience of leading a large team within Ubisoft as like working while "flaming barrels [are] falling down from a construction site," akin to a scene from the arcade game Donkey Kong.
paragraphs.cn: 曾参与《看门狗》和《细胞分裂》的资深开发者Clint Hocking形容，在育碧领导大型团队就像一边工作，一边面对「从工地上滚落的燃烧木桶」，如同街机游戏《大金刚》中的场景。

paragraphs.en: Hocking made the comment as part of a lengthy discussion about how his role changed as development team sizes grew, leading him to feel less effective while leading Ubisoft's multi-studio effort on Watch Dogs Legion .
paragraphs.cn: Hocking在一次长篇讨论中谈到，随着开发团队规模扩大，他的职责如何发生变化；在领导育碧多个工作室共同开发《看门狗：军团》时，他也因此觉得自己的作用变小了。

paragraphs.en: Hocking and Ubisoft parted ways abruptly earlier this year amid a reshuffle at the top of the publisher's prized Assassin's Creed brand, despite being in the middle of leading development on Assassin's Creed Hexe. The franchise's next blockbuster, Hexe is understood to still be on target to arrive in 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 今年早些时候，育碧对旗下重要的《刺客信条》品牌高层进行重组，Hocking与公司突然分道扬镳，尽管当时他仍在领导《刺客信条：Hexe》的开发。据悉，这款系列下一部大作仍计划于2027年推出。

paragraphs.en: "On [Splinter Cell] Chaos Theory, I would just walk over to the desk of the person who was making a thing, and sit down with them and talk to them about what they're doing," Hocking recalled, speaking via the FRVR podcast .
paragraphs.cn: Hocking在FRVR播客中回忆道：「开发《细胞分裂：混沌理论》时，我会直接走到负责某项内容的人桌前，坐下来和他们聊聊正在做什么。」

paragraphs.en: "We could have a conversation," he continued, suggesting a scenario where he was able to offer granular input such as the placement of a specific light source to better guide player movement.
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说道：「我们可以直接交流。」例如，他当时能够对某个光源的具体位置提出细致建议，以便更好地引导玩家移动。

paragraphs.en: "But on a huge game with 1,000 people, you go into a meeting to review some piece of content — some quest, say, or some location — and there's 30 people in the meeting," Hocking continued. "Directors and producers and project managers, and very often even the level designer who built it isn't even in the meeting.
paragraphs.cn: Hocking接着说：「但在一款有1,000人参与的大型游戏中，你走进会议室评审某项内容，比如一个任务或某个地点，现场会有30个人，包括总监、制作人和项目经理，而真正制作这项内容的关卡设计师甚至常常不在会议里。」

paragraphs.en: "And it's like, 'where's the person who worked on this?' 'Ah, they're working on the thing they need to do for their next meeting. But don't worry we'll take notes and put it in Jira for them.' So there's people there writing down what you say, making tasks of it.
paragraphs.cn: 「然后你会问：『做这个的人在哪里？』对方回答：『他们正在处理下次会议要用的东西。不过别担心，我们会做笔记并替他们录入Jira。』于是现场有人把你的话记下来，再把它们变成任务。」

paragraphs.en: "Then you finish the review, you say, 'OK, when are we going to see the iterations and the improvements we talked about?' And they're like, 'Well... so it's going to be six weeks before we see an iteration on this because the person who needs to do the iteration is working on this [other thing].' Then, by the time you get back there six weeks later, maybe the whole context is different. It very often feels like... you know those flaming barrels that Donkey Kong throws down at you? Very often game development feels like this stream of burning barrels falling down from a construction site."
paragraphs.cn: 「评审结束后，你问：『好吧，我们什么时候能看到刚才讨论的迭代和改进？』他们会说：『嗯……要六周后才能看到，因为负责迭代的人正在做另一件事。』等六周后再回来，整个背景可能都已经变了。那种感觉经常就像……你知道《大金刚》朝你扔下来的燃烧木桶吧？游戏开发经常就像一连串燃烧的木桶从工地上不断滚下来。」

paragraphs.en: Hocking initially joined Ubisoft to work on the legendary 2002 stealth action adventure Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell, which he contributed to as a designer and scriptwriter. Hocking then served as creative director on its follow-up, Splinter Cell: Chaos Theory, before holding the same role on Far Cry 2.
paragraphs.cn: Hocking最初加入育碧，是为了参与2002年的传奇潜行动作冒险游戏《汤姆·克兰西之细胞分裂》，并担任设计师和编剧。此后，他出任续作《细胞分裂：混沌理论》的创意总监，之后又在《孤岛惊魂2》中担任同一职位。

paragraphs.en: During a period away from Ubisoft, Hocking served years at LucasArts, Valve, and Amazon. Hocking then returned to Ubisoft to serve once again as a creative director, this time on Watch Dogs: Legion, which launched in 2020 to a mixed response. Following that, Hocking moved over to Assassin's Creed, and had been leading work on Hexe out of the company's Montreal studio. Legion remains Hocking's only shipped title since Far Cry 2 back in 2008.
paragraphs.cn: 离开育碧期间，Hocking曾先后在LucasArts、Valve和亚马逊工作多年。后来他重返育碧，再次担任创意总监，负责2020年推出、评价褒贬不一的《看门狗：军团》。随后他转入《刺客信条》团队，在公司蒙特利尔工作室领导《Hexe》的开发。《军团》仍是他自2008年《孤岛惊魂2》以来唯一正式发售的作品。

paragraphs.en: Hocking's role leading Assassin's Creed Hexe has now been taken up by Jean Guesdon, the Assassin's Creed franchise's Head of Content, who is seen as a steady and experience hand with a lengthy track record working on numerous titles in the series.
paragraphs.cn: 如今，Hocking领导《刺客信条：Hexe》的职位已由系列内容负责人Jean Guesdon接任。Guesdon长期参与多部系列作品，被视为稳健且经验丰富的老手。

summary: 前育碧创意总监Clint Hocking表示，当游戏团队扩大到1,000人时，反馈往往要经过会议、记录和任务系统，六周后才能看到迭代；这种失控感就像《大金刚》中不断从工地滚下来的燃烧木桶。
opus_summary: Clint Hocking用《大金刚》的燃烧木桶形容大型游戏开发：千人团队让创意总监难以直接接触实际开发者，一次细微调整也可能要等待六周，等结果回来时项目背景早已改变。
